name: Tokyo

palette.name: Metropolitan Green
palette.rationale: The Tokyo metropolitan symbol is commonly presented in a vivid green associated with future growth.

palette.name: Transit Blue
palette.rationale: A bright transport blue reflects station signage, rail systems, and the city's designed mobility layer.

palette.name: Night Glass
palette.rationale: Dark glass and steel high-rises shape an editorial neutral for Tokyo's evening skyline.

sources.title: Tokyo Metropolitan Government
sources.note: Used for official metropolitan identity context.

sources.title: Corporate Identity
sources.note: Used as transport-brand context for the editorial transit blue.

notes: Seed record with one official metropolitan identity color and two editorial urban-system colors.
editorialSummary: Tokyo's starter palette combines metropolitan green, transport blue, and dark skyline glass to suggest civic identity, movement, and high-density night architecture.
